content.en:
Ye Tian refined the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart very quickly, and it didn't take long to refine this Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.

Suddenly, he felt that the shackles in the darkness were gone.

"Isn't it ......"

Ye Tian had some guesses in his heart, and he was quite excited in his heart.

He wanted to try if he was really free of shackles and could easily impact the supreme true ancestor's combat power.

Of course, if he wants to break through, he still needs to cultivate a Thousand Dao Technique to the consummation realm.

It's just that there were shackles before, which made it difficult for him to cultivate a Thousand Dao Techniques to the consummation level, which was also a common shackle for living beings.

Otherwise, with the background of those Nine Heavens and even legendary-level forces, it would not be too difficult to cultivate an invincible True Ancestor extreme powerhouse.

But even if it costs a huge amount of money to cultivate an invincible true ancestor who is extremely strong, there is no way to help them break the shackles and achieve the supreme true ancestor.

Therefore, those big forces didn't want to waste time and resources to go all out to cultivate the Invincible True Ancestor Extreme Strong.

After all, if the Invincible True Ancestor Extreme Strength cannot break through to become the Supreme True Ancestor, it will not stay at the True Ancestor level for too long, while the Invincible True Ancestor Extreme Strength and the top Invincible True Ancestor break through to become a Dao Ancestor, and the increase in strength is about the same.

Therefore, in terms of income, it is not cost-effective to bother to cultivate the Invincible True Ancestor Extreme Strong.

Of course, if the Invincible True Ancestor could rely on his own opportunity to ascend to the ultimate powerhouse of the Invincible True Ancestor, the major forces would be extremely welcome.

For example, Black Wind Mountain did not try his best to cultivate Ye Tian, but Ye Tian himself raised his strength to the extreme of Invincible True Ancestor, and Black Wind Mountain was naturally happy.

At this time.

Ye Tian comprehended the Great Wilderness Law Body, and sure enough, he found something different.

Before, he had comprehended the Great Wilderness Law Body, but the shackles in the underworld had been binding him, making it difficult for him to break the bottleneck and cultivate the Great Wilderness Law Body to the consummation realm.

But now, he felt that restraint disappear.

"There is hope, give me a few more years, I promise to be able to cultivate the Great Wilderness Law Body to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he declared a retreat.

His son Ye Xingchen went back to stabilize the True Ancestor realm, while his daughter Ye Xingyue had just mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden and was not far from the True Ancestor, so he was ready to go back and impact the True Ancestor realm.

Xiao Yue and Ye Yu had also just mastered the power of the dark taboo, so they naturally wanted to retreat and study it carefully.

In this way, everyone began to retreat and cultivate.

Time passes day by day, and tens of thousands of years are passed in the blink of an eye.

During this period, a forbidden treasure was born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but unfortunately the value was not very large, and only some low-grade and medium-sized forbidden strange things were unearthed.

However, it has also attracted a lot of forces to target, the invincible true ancestor has not fallen, but some ordinary true ancestors, elite true ancestors and top true ancestors have fallen a lot, and the strongest true ancestors have also fallen dozens.

Compared with the battle of the Forbidden Gujing, the loss this time was very small.

And Ye Tian didn't participate, because he was still in retreat and cultivating.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

In fact, he had been in retreat for a long time in a time-accelerated environment.

this day.

Ye Tian's soul was shaken, and he opened his eyes, revealing endless joy.

"It's finally time to break through!"

Ye Tian laughed.

As he spoke, his Great Wilderness Law Body instantly broke through to the realm of perfection.

Bang!!!!!

In an instant, his momentum broke into another level, and a source of origin appeared in the depths of the soul origin, which was the supreme Dao source.

I saw the birth of the Supreme Dao Source, and countless Origin sources poured in, nourishing Ye Tian's soul and body, and constantly increasing his strength.

Stepping into the supreme true ancestor combat power, Ye Tian's current strength has not improved much, after all, he has just broken through, and the foundation needs to be accumulated.

But Ye Tian obviously sensed that his cultivation of the Middle Thousand Dao Technique was far from being as simple as in the past, and he would soon be able to quickly cultivate the other Middle Thousand Dao Techniques to the consummation realm, and it would not even take too long to cultivate the Middle Thousand Dao Technique to the extreme level.

But.

What Ye Tian needs most at the moment is an Origin Forbidden Technique, an Origin Forbidden Technique that can quickly improve his strength!

"Black Wind Mountain must have such a secret technique, go to Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian cast the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique and descended on the Wind King Small Realm.

Immediately, he took out the general's order to contact the Wind King.

"General Jiuji, have you contacted this king for anything?"

The Wind King's voice came.

"Lord Wind King, I want to know if the Black Wind Mountain has any forbidden techniques that use the power of the origin to increase strength?" Ye Tian asked.

"What, you want to forbid the arts? Do you know that if you practice the forbidden arts, the foundation will be completely destroyed! Hey, no, your breath ......"

The Wind King was extremely surprised, and a wisp of consciousness incarnation descended in front of Ye Tian.

"You have condensed the Supreme Dao Source and become the Supreme True Ancestor?"

The Wind King asked in surprise.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian admitted.

"It's amazing!" the Wind King sighed, "I didn't expect you to achieve the goal that I couldn't even achieve." Supreme True Ancestor, it's too difficult and too difficult to step in. I don't know how you stepped into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor, but now that you have stepped into the Supreme True Ancestor, you can become a Heavenly General of the Black Wind Mountain!"

"Heavenly General!"

It was the first time Ye Tian heard that there was a position of Heavenly General in Black Wind Mountain.

I saw the Wind King explain: "The Heavenly General is above the general, but the status is equal to the Heavenly King, and even to a certain extent, the status is much higher than that of the ordinary Heavenly King. Moreover, the Heavenly King cannot command the Heavenly Generals, only the Ten Kings are qualified to govern the Heavenly Generals!"

"Lord Wind King, will the Heavenly General be able to obtain the forbidden technique?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally, it is possible!" the Wind King said with a smile: "If the Supreme True Ancestor does not cultivate forbidden techniques, wouldn't it be a waste of this talent?, moreover, all the forbidden techniques of Black Wind Mountain are open to the Heavenly Generals, and they don't need any price!"

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately excited.

But the Wind King said again: "Nine Extremes Heavenly General, because the Heavenly General is too important, it is not suitable to be exposed at the moment, and it is best to only expose it at the most critical time, so it is not possible to hold a Heavenly General canonization ceremony for you for the time being." In addition, don't tell anyone about your breakthrough to become a Supreme True Ancestor for the time being! Try not to go out recently, otherwise it will be easy for some people with special secret techniques to see through!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately.

The Wind King exchanged Ye Tian's general order for a Heavenly General Token, through which he could enter the Black Wind Mountain's Forbidden Art Library.

This is a bookmaker who can only enter the Heavenly General and the Ten Kings, and the Heavenly King is not qualified to enter.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Black Wind Mountain Forbidden Technique Treasure House through the Heavenly General Order, but after entering the treasure house, he was a little disappointed, there are not many forbidden techniques here, to be exact, there are very few.

There are only a few dozen forbidden techniques here, and each forbidden technique is inscribed on an ancient stone tablet.

Ye Tian looked at these forbidden techniques and found that many forbidden techniques were used to improve the strength of the physical body, some forbidden techniques were used to increase the strength of the soul, and some forbidden techniques were used to enhance the power of the true ancestor.

Of course, there are also temporary outbreaks of forbidden techniques, which consume the power of the origin to temporarily explode combat power, and if other people cast such forbidden techniques, they will be abolished after they are cast.

But his supreme Dao source can continuously generate the power of the source, and the power of the source is almost endless, so he is not afraid of consumption.

Ye Tian was not greedy, he only chose the Four Forbidden Techniques, if he cultivated too many forbidden techniques, it would delay the cultivation time, and the gains outweighed the losses.

A forbidden technique for refining the flesh - no delusion alchemy technique!

A soul-type forbidden technique - Soul Shattering Refining Technique!

A True Ancestor Power Forbidden Technique - Ten Thousand Stacks Origin Technique!

There is also a temporary outbreak of forbidden art, the Ninefold Burst Technique!

The four forbidden techniques were passed on by Ye Tian one by one.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left Black Wind Mountain.

After returning to the human race, Ye Tian began to cultivate the four forbidden techniques with all his might.

Every moment, he could feel a large amount of Origin Power being consumed, and then a large amount of Origin Power was born.

If it weren't for the Supreme Dao Ancestor, even if the other True Ancestors possessed a large amount of the Treasure of Restoring the Origin Power, they would not be able to withstand this kind of consumption, and the Origin would be consumed in an instant, completely obscuring the public.

As time passed, Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger, and the power of his body, soul, and true ancestor all increased at an incredible speed.

Moreover, Ye Tian's Ten Thousand True Spear, Selfless Vacuum, and Tiangang Extreme Speed were all progressing at an incomparably fast speed.

Among them, the selfless vacuum in the Xiaocheng realm, the middle thousand dao techniques, quickly reached the Dacheng realm, and the ten thousand thousand dao techniques of the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear and Tiangang Extreme Speed were also improving to the consummation realm.

Other than that.

Ye Tian's forbidden body absorbed the power of the dark forbidden far faster, and the tempering of the forbidden body was much faster than in the past.

At this rate, it is estimated that it will not be long before his forbidden body is sure to increase to fifty percent.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.
